## Summary

What changed?

## Risk

- [ ] Statement parsing or import/reconciliation behavior
- [ ] Ledger mutation, audit, reversal, or SQLite migration behavior
- [ ] MCP/CLI tool surface or filesystem access behavior
- [ ] Public package exports, release workflow, or npm metadata
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run release:check`
- [ ] Changelog updated when behavior, schema, MCP/CLI surface, packaging, or trust metadata changed
- [ ] Security/privacy impact considered
- [ ] Examples, fixtures, logs, and screenshots contain no real financial data
